name: tingly-box
description: Your Intelligence, Orchestrated. Every builder. Every team. Every agent. For Everyone.
summaryZh: Your Intelligence, Orchestrated. Every builder. Every team. Every agent. For Everyone. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。

fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
